title: Terms & Conditions
draft_warning: Draft placeholder: these terms are not final legal advice and should be reviewed before use.

sections.introduction: This page is a draft summary for Party.LAN customers and will be updated with final terms before bookings are accepted.
sections.booking: Booking details, dates, venue access and package choice will be confirmed during enquiry.
sections.payment: Payment terms are not yet finalised and will be confirmed before any booking is accepted.
sections.cancellation: Cancellation terms are draft placeholders and should not be treated as final commitments.
sections.venue_access: Customers may be asked to provide access details so equipment can be delivered and set up safely.
sections.room_and_power_requirements: Party.LAN may ask for room photos, rough dimensions and power access information to help plan the setup.
sections.supervision: Appropriate adult supervision and venue permissions may be required depending on the event.
sections.equipment_care: Customers and guests should treat supplied equipment carefully during the hosted session.
sections.damage: Damage responsibilities are draft placeholders and will be confirmed in final terms.
sections.travel: Travel availability and any travel considerations will be confirmed during enquiry.
sections.contact: Use the contact route on the homepage for questions.
